programs.title: Super Eruption
programs.desc: Super Eruption is a non-stop thrill ride - the story of two people who come together to put a stop to one of the greatest natural disasters to ever threaten humanity.

programs.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programs.desc: Andrea Fanti, a brilliant Head of Internal Medicine, has his life turned upside down following an accident. He survives, but loses his memory of the last twelve years of his life. When he wakes up, he struggles to remember his life.

programs.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programs.desc: Andrea is hospitalized in the Internal Medicine ward, hoping that the place most familiar to him will help him recover his memory. Giulia oversees his rehabilitation but finds herself dealing with a different man to the one she knew.

programs.title: Buried In The Backyard
programs.desc: A car robbery and Santa Claus bandit captivate headlines, and the crime goes unsolved for years until a local man is found buried in the snow.
